description: Dynamic pod spawner & proxy for ephemeral AI agent workspaces on Kubernetes without CRDs

tool.description: Dynamic pod spawner & proxy for ephemeral AI agent workspaces on Kubernetes without CRDs
tool.name: io.github.nogoo9/no-crd

cmd.description: Transport channel for MCP client-server communication: stdio, http, both
cmd.name: --transport

cmd.description: Kubernetes cluster access scope: cluster-wide or namespace-restricted
cmd.name: --mode

cmd.description: Target namespace for workspace pods, services, and local templates
cmd.name: --namespace

cmd.description: HTTP port for SSE transport, routing proxy, and dashboard UI
cmd.name: --port

cmd.description: Network interface host address to bind the HTTP server to
cmd.name: --host

cmd.description: Granularity of output logs: debug, info, warning, error, fatal
cmd.name: --log-level

cmd.description: Bypass startup diagnostics checking Kubernetes RBAC access permissions
cmd.name: --disable-permission-checks

cmd.description: Allowed origins for HTTP CORS cross-site requests (default: *)
cmd.name: --cors-origin

cmd.description: Allowed HTTP request methods for CORS configuration
cmd.name: --cors-methods

cmd.description: Allowed HTTP header names for incoming CORS requests
cmd.name: --cors-headers

cmd.description: Allow credentials (cookies, headers) in cross-origin requests
cmd.name: --cors-allow-credentials

cmd.description: Mandatory OAuth scope claim value to query or get workspaces
cmd.name: --auth-required-read-scope

cmd.description: Mandatory OAuth scope claim value to spawn or stop workspaces
cmd.name: --auth-required-write-scope

cmd.description: JSONPath pattern to extract scope permissions from the token payload
cmd.name: --auth-scope-jsonpath

cmd.description: OAuth role required to view workspaces (e.g. reader)
cmd.name: --auth-required-read-role

cmd.description: OAuth role required to spawn or delete workspaces (e.g. writer)
cmd.name: --auth-required-write-role

cmd.description: JSONPath query to retrieve user roles list from token payload
cmd.name: --auth-roles-jsonpath

name: io.github.nogoo9/no-crd
summary: Dynamic pod spawner & proxy for ephemeral AI agent workspaces on Kubernetes without CRDs
title: No Crd
